ham.subject: Out of Office: Jane Doe (Auto-Reply)
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will return on Monday, 25 April 2026. I will have limited access to email during this period.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague, Mark Thompson, at mark.thompson@example.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

Jane Doe
Senior Analyst
Global Insights Division
Example Corp

spam.subject: Urgent: Scholarship Award Notification – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

We are delighted to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient of the prestigious Global Scholars Award from the University of Excellence. This award is granted to a limited number of candidates and is contingent upon the completion of the verification process.

To secure your scholarship, please submit the following documentation within 48 hours:

1. Proof of enrollment (transcript or enrollment letter).
2. Identification copy (passport or driver’s licence).
3. Confirmation of contact details.

Complete the verification by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Failure to submit the required documents within the stipulated time will result in automatic forfeiture of the scholarship. Additionally, please note that a nominal processing fee of $150 must be paid to the University’s Scholarship Office to cover administrative costs. The payment can be made via the secure link provided above.

For any questions or concerns, you may contact the Scholarship Office directly at scholarship.office@university.edu.

We look forward to welcoming you to the University of Excellence and celebrating your academic achievements.

Sincerely,

Dr. Emily Carter
Associate Dean, Office of Undergraduate Scholarships
University of Excellence

P.S. This offer is time‑sensitive. Prompt action is essential to guarantee your scholarship award.
